backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the 15sec app, defining data structures and logic for video posts, replies, user profiles, follows, notifications, likes, and visitor statistics, with role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the full-screen scroll-snap feed redesign (100dvh cards, snap-type y mandatory) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and page in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router, React Query, theming, authentication gating, and the full-screen layout with a sticky header and overflow-hidden outlet for the snap feed.
frontend/src/components/Branding.tsx: Simple branding component rendering the '15sec' logo text with an animated pulsing red dot.
frontend/src/components/CookieConsent.ts: Cookie consent banner that appears once per session, persisting acceptance to localStorage and dismissing itself on user confirmation.
frontend/src/components/FollowButton.tsx: Button component that toggles follow/unfollow state for a given user principal, using React Query mutations and showing loading/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with border and muted styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with links to Home, Create, Notifications, Admin, and Account pages; displays the authenticated user's avatar and an unread notification indicator.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login prompt card for unauthenticated users, providing an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Displays a dropdown panel of user notifications (likes, shares, replies), marks them as read on mount, and navigates to the relevant video or profile when clicked.
frontend/src/components/ReplyDialog.tsx: A modal dialog that wraps the VideoReplyCreator component, allowing users to record or upload a short video reply to a parent video.
frontend/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx: A modal dialog for sharing a video post or reply, providing a copyable link and an internal 'Share on 15sec' action that triggers the share mutation.
frontend/src/components/UsernameSetupMod: A blocking modal that prompts new users to choose a unique username, with debounced availability checking and profile creation on submit.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCard.ts: Renders a full-bleed video post card with overlaid creator info, like/reply/share action buttons, and an admin/owner delete option with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCreator: A form component that accepts a video file, collects a title, uploads the video with progress tracking via ExternalBlob, and creates a new video post.
frontend/src/components/VideoRecorder.ts: A camera-based video recorder component that starts/stops recording up to a configurable max duration, then provides the recorded file for further use or allows re-recording.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCard.t: Renders a single video reply card with avatar, video playback, like/unlike, share, nested reply, and delete (owner/admin) functionality using various query hooks and dialog components.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCreato: Provides a UI for creating a video reply to a post, supporting both file upload and recording modes, with upload progress tracking and submission via the createVideoReply mutation.
frontend/src/components/VideoUploader.ts: Handles video file selection and automatically trims videos exceeding a configurable max duration using Canvas and MediaRecorder APIs before passing the file to a parent callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, video posts/replies, likes, shares, notifications, and visitor stats.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS variables using oklch colors, and adds custom snap-scroll utility classes for a feed layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Account management page allowing authenticated users to view/edit their profile (username, avatar), see their posts and replies, manage follow counts, toggle theme, logout, and delete their account.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard page displaying active account counts, visitor stats, and a user management table with actions to promote, demote, or permanently delete user accounts.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePage.tsx: Content creation page that lets users choose between uploading or recording a short video (max 15 seconds), then passes the selected file to VideoPostCreator for submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home feed page that fetches all video posts, sorts them by timestamp, and renders them in a vertically snapping full-screen scroll feed using VideoPostCard.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Public profile page that displays a user's avatar, username, follower/following counts, follow button, and tabbed lists of their video posts and replies looked up by username.
frontend/src/pages/VideoDetailPage.tsx: Video detail page that shows a single video post and its paginated replies, with a load-more button and navigation back to the feed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom CSS variable-based color tokens, border radius, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a TikTok-style full-screen video feed app, tracking existing features, architectural notes, and pending feature requests at schema version 1.0.0.
